# fixture-single-agent

Golden file fixture for single agent

## Quick Start

### Claude Code
```bash
cd fixture-single-agent
# Claude Code will read CLAUDE.md and become your agent
```

### Codex
```bash
cd fixture-single-agent
# Codex will read CODEX.md and become your agent
```

## Structure

- `CLAUDE.md` — Agent instructions for Claude Code
- `CODEX.md` — Agent instructions for Codex
- `agent_spec.yaml` — Full agent specification
- `policies/` — Policy rules (deny, ask, allow)
- `skills/` — Skill definitions
- `context/` — Background knowledge
- `docs/` — Documentation
- `meta.yaml` — Generation metadata

## Policies

This agent enforces strict policy rules. See `policies/policy.yaml` for details.

### Forbidden Actions
- delete_file
- send_email
